framework.name: Shared Liability Model for Delegated Agent Payments
framework.description: PSD3 is moving toward a shared-liability model for autonomous agent flows (VRP/MIT), distinct from human-signed mandates where liability follows current SCA rules. Initial deployments will use micro-delegation and limited MCCs while data models mature. This is the first concrete regulatory signal on gap_6.
framework.raw_quote: For autonomous flows (leveraging VRP or MIT frameworks), the industry is likely to move toward a shared-liability model.

source.title: Agentic checkout beyond the hype: what European players can do to stay ...
